COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-04-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Ass'd to Dept. 210 for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff is not present, but appears by counsel, Ian B. Kelley; defendant appears by Emory Speck, with counsel, Sidney R. Sheray. The case is settled as follows: Judgment for plaintiff, against defendants. Defendants to pay to plaintiff the sum of $2,500.00. Each side to pay its own attorney fees and costs. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare a judgment. The case is set for an OSC re Dismissal per CRC 225.
